name: marble-tournament-server
description: Deterministic marble-racing tournament server: schedules 100 marbles through brackets of 5, broadcasts race seeds over WebSocket, records results in SQLite, and serves a viewer that replays each race locally.

comments.dependencies: No installable runtime deps — SQLite is node:sqlite (built in) and the WebSocket server is hand-rolled in src/ws.js. The headless simulator uses Playwright's Chromium, provided by the environment (globally installed).
